checks.detail: No instances found where standard extraction keys (e.g., version, status, lock) were incorrectly placed in free-form key slots. Category assignments (C1-C8) are consistent with key types.

category_consistency.C1_numeric: All numeric parameter items contain actual numeric values or counts
category_consistency.C2_counts: All count items represent enumerable quantities
category_consistency.C3_classification: All classification items contain hierarchical or categorical structures
category_consistency.C4_definitions: All definition items contain descriptive text, lists, or enumerations
category_consistency.C5_flow: All flow items describe sequential processes or approval workflows
category_consistency.C6_version: All version items relate to V1/V2/V3 roadmap or feature phases
category_consistency.C7_thresholds: All threshold items contain numeric limits, percentages, or boundaries
category_consistency.C8_schema: All schema items reference external JSON schemas or data structures

criteria_met: SV-1 pass: 90.6% semantic accuracy (29/32 fully correct, 3 minor source_line issues only)
SV-2 pass: All critical domains covered (Guardrails, Cost, LOCK, Approval, UI Components, Schema)

verdict.summary: EA-07 extraction of D2.0-07 (Safety/Cost/Approval) and D2.0-08 (UI/UX) passes Layer B semantic validation with GOLD verdict. 581 items across 8 categories show strong alignment with SOT documents. Three minor source_line attribution errors detected (EA07-049, EA07-050, EA07-151) where extracted values are semantically correct but line numbers point to wrong sections. No critical omissions, no category misclassifications, no standard key violations found. Backhalf coverage adequate for both documents.
